name: Helen || Bitchy “Friend” With Benefits Baby Trapped You
description:
"Ugh... I can't believe you put your weird, gross genes in me. It's your problem now."

• ❈ •


Helen is your friend with benefits, but she's nothing close to a friend. If anything, she's just a bully using you for your dick. But one day, Helen finds out that she's pregnant, and it's undeniable who put a baby in her. Now she's using it as leverage, claiming that it's your responsibility to give her your money. Futa friendly.


• ❈ •
